other: Gains {st:ObsessionAndGreedRodion} on the first time she hits 0 {st:LookingFutureRodion}, when staggered, or when {id:10716} dies.
On death, she gives {id:10415} Defense Coin Power and bonus damage against targets with Shield.
usage: Starts with 30 {st:FutureEyeOnRodion}. When she has it, she gains {st:LookingFutureRodion} while clashing, making her clash better and deal more damage the more clashes happen, and she gets a free use of her Evade when attacked unopposed, with a {st:SuperCoin}, or on clash lose. She loses stacks for every Skill use, Clash, or use of the Defense.

At 0 {st:FutureEyeOnRodion}, she {st:FullReload}s, gains a copy of {skill:10916|07}, and converts it to {st:FutureEyeOffRodion}. At this state, she gains 3 {st:AttackUp}, 3 {st:DefenseDown}, and gains 10 stacks per turn. In 3 turns, she hits 30 and it converts back to {st:FutureEyeOnRodion}.

When she has {skill:10916|07}, she inflicts {st:TeachersPreyRodion} on her last target on the previous turn. Killing that enemy with {skill:10916|07} generates another copy of the skill. Killing with the generated copy doesn't generate another copy. You'll need to hit 0 {st:FutureEyeOnRodion} again to get another use.

Starts with 10 {st:AccelBullet} which are used by her S2 and S3. At 0 stacks, her S2 is replaced with her S2-2 instead. Spending rounds gives her {st:Breath} and both of her S3s gain bonus {st:VibrationExplosion}s, Coin Power, and Damage.
Using her Clashable Counter brings her up to 5 {st:AccelBullet}, ensuring she has enough to maximize  the damage bonus on {skill:10916|07}

passiveBonusNotes: Assumes max Accelerating Future, attacking Game Target, and target has shield

1091601.desc:
If this unit has 1+ [AccelBullet], Skill 3 gains Coin Power +1 and deals +25% damage

Base Skills deal +1% damage for every 2 [Combustion] on the main target (max 15%)
- If the main target has Shield, Base Skills deal +3% damage instead (max 45%)
1091601.name: La Spada di Palermo

1091602.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain 30 [FutureEyeOnRodion]
At 0 [FutureEyeOnRodion] Stack, convert [FutureEyeOnRodion] into [FutureEyeOffRodion]

While this unit has [FutureEyeOnRodion], activate the following effects:
- In a Clash, gain 1 [LookingFutureRodion] with every Clash (5 times per Skill)
- When attacked by an Unopposed Attack, [SuperCoin] Attack, or losing a Clash against an Attack Skill, activate the "Precognition" Skill (once per turn)

The following causes this unit to lose [FutureEyeOnRodion] Stack:
- Lose 1 [FutureEyeOnRodion] with every Clash
- When this unit activates the "Precognition" Skill via Passive effect due to being attacked by an Unopposed Attack or [SuperCoin] Attack, lose 3 [FutureEyeOnRodion]
- When this unit activates the "Precognition" Skill via Passive effect due to losing a Clash, lose 5 [FutureEyeOnRodion]

The following causes this unit to gain [ObsessionAndGreedRodion] next turn:
- If this unit's [FutureEyeOnRodion] Stack drops to 0
- If this unit is Staggered
- If The House of Spiders: The Thumb Apprentice Heathcliff is defeated (if the said Identity is already defeated when this unit Substitutes in, gain [ObsessionAndGreedRodion] at Turn Start)

Turn End: When Staggered for the first time in this Encounter, recover from Stagger (excluding forced Staggers)
1091602.name: The Eye of Precognition

1091603.desc:
Gain 2 [Breath] and +2 [Breath] Count for every [AccelBullet] spent
When flipping a Coin that spends [AccelBullet], the attack does not get canceled even when this unit is out of [AccelBullet]

This Identity counts only as an "Identity that inflicts [Combustion] and [Vibration]"

Turn Start: If this unit has "Disposal" on its Dashboard, inflict [TeachersPreyRodion] on the enemy this unit attacked last in the previous turn (in Focused Encounters, the Parts count for this purpose)
- If there are no targets that satisfy the condition above, inflict [TeachersPreyRodion] on the enemy that has the lowest HP
1091603.name: The Shame of Famiglia Bognatelli

1091604.desc:
If this unit is defeated at Encounter Start, or if this unit is defeated during the Encounter, Blade of the House of Spiders Ryōshū gains the following effects:
- Gain 1 [SojiRyoshuEchoPast]
- Defense Skill Coin Power +1, Base Attack Skills deal +10% damage against targets that have Shield
1091604.name: Saikai [再会] - The Thumb

1091612.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain 30 [FutureEyeOnRodion]
At 0 [FutureEyeOnRodion] Stack, convert [FutureEyeOnRodion] into [FutureEyeOffRodion]

While this unit has [FutureEyeOnRodion], activate the following effects:
- In a Clash, gain 1 [LookingFutureRodion] with every Clash (5 times per Skill)
- When attacked by an Unopposed Attack, [SuperCoin] Attack, or losing a Clash against an Attack Skill, activate the "Precognition" Skill (once per turn)

The following causes this unit to lose [FutureEyeOnRodion] Stack:
- Lose 1 [FutureEyeOnRodion] with every Clash
- When this unit activates the "Precognition" Skill via Passive effect due to being attacked by an Unopposed Attack or [SuperCoin] Attack, lose 3 [FutureEyeOnRodion]
- When this unit activates the "Precognition" Skill via Passive effect due to losing a Clash, lose 5 [FutureEyeOnRodion]

At the end of the turn this unit's [FutureEyeOnRodion] is converted into [FutureEyeOffRodion], activate the following effects:
- [FullReload] (once per Encounter)
- At the start of the next turn, if this unit has no "Disposal" on its Dashboard, replace a Base Skill with "Disposal" (prioritizes the Skill on the leftmost Slot's top row)

The following causes this unit to gain [ObsessionAndGreedRodion] next turn:
- If this unit's [FutureEyeOnRodion] Stack drops to 0
- If this unit is Staggered
- If The House of Spiders: The Thumb Apprentice Heathcliff is defeated (if the said Identity is already defeated when this unit Substitutes in, gain [ObsessionAndGreedRodion] at Turn Start)

Turn End: When Staggered due to damage for the first time in this Encounter, recover from Stagger (excluding forced Staggers)
1091612.name: The Eye of Precognition

1091621.desc:
1 ally with the fastest Speed: When triggering [VibrationExplosion] on the enemy, gain 2 Offense Level Up next turn (once per turn)
- If the said ally is "The Thumb" Identity, gain 1 [Agility] as well (once per turn)
1091621.name: Weaklings, Not Worth Shit

data.desc:
Upon successfully evading all Coins on a Skill, use "Sezionatura di Coniglio" as an Unopposed Attack against the attacker (once per turn)
Coin Power +1 for every 2 [FutureEyeOnRodion] Stacks on self (max 4)
Base Power +1 for every 2 excess [FutureEyeOnRodion] Stacks on self past 10 Stacks (max 4)
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Breath] Count (once per turn)
[OnSucceedEvade] Gain 2 [Breath] (2 times per turn)
[EndSkillAll] Lose 2 [FutureEyeOnRodion] on self
data.name: Precognition

data.desc:

[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Breath] Count (once per turn)
[OnSucceedEvade] Gain 2 [Breath] (2 times per turn)
